items.definition_en: A day when most people do not have to work or go to school.
items.example_en: Christmas is a public holiday in many countries.

items.definition_en: The specific day scheduled for taking an exam.
items.example_en: She was nervous on her final exam day.

items.definition_en: The final day by which something must be completed or submitted.
items.example_en: The due date for the assignment is next Monday.

items.definition_en: The yearly celebration of the day of a marriage.
items.example_en: They celebrated their tenth wedding anniversary in Paris.

items.definition_en: A special day each year to celebrate a person's given name.
items.example_en: In Poland, people often give gifts for someone's name day.

items.definition_en: A weekend that includes or is extended by a public holiday.
items.example_en: We're going on a trip during the holiday weekend.

items.definition_en: The first day something begins.
items.example_en: The project start date is April 10th.

items.definition_en: The last day that something happens or is valid.
items.example_en: The contract's end date is in December.

items.definition_en: The first day an event, business, or activity is available to people.
items.example_en: Fans waited for the baseball opening day.

items.definition_en: The final day when something is available or open.
items.example_en: The exhibition's closing date is next week.

items.definition_en: A period when schools are closed for a break.
items.example_en: Summer school holidays are the favorite time for students.

items.definition_en: The day when employees receive their wages.
items.example_en: I'm going shopping on payday.

items.definition_en: The yearly celebration of the day someone started a job.
items.example_en: She received a gift for her ten-year work anniversary.

items.definition_en: The official day a person stops working, usually because of age.
items.example_en: He is looking forward to his retirement date next spring.

items.definition_en: The day when students formally complete their course of study.
items.example_en: Her family attended her graduation day ceremony.

items.definition_en: The initial day of an event or period.
items.example_en: He felt nervous on his first day at the new job.

items.definition_en: The final day of an event or period.
items.example_en: On the last day of school, students were excited for summer.

items.definition_en: A special day to celebrate a country's importance or history.
items.example_en: The city holds fireworks on the national day.

items.definition_en: The day scheduled for a midterm exam in school or university.
items.example_en: Students marked the midterm date on their calendars.

items.definition_en: The anniversary of the day an organization or city was founded.
items.example_en: The university celebrates its founding day every October.
